description: Maps Run Faster positive qualities reference table to run-faster.json data

mappings.notes: Most qualities match by name directly. 'Fame (Local/National/Megacorporate/Global)' in the reference are four separate rows but map to a single 'fame' entry in data using hasRating/ratings structure (rating 1=Local 4K, 2=National 8K, 3=Megacorporate 12K, 4=Global 16K). 'Jack of All Trades, Master of None' in the reference maps to 'Jack of All Trades' (id: jack-of-all-trades) in data. 'Solid/Legendary Rep' maps to id: solid-rep. The reference karma field is a string for tiered costs (e.g. '5 or 10', '10 per rating') while data uses karmaCost (integer) for fixed-cost qualities or hasRating/ratings for tiered ones.

unmappedReferenceRows.note: Reference row for Local Fame maps to data entry id 'fame' at ratings.1 (karmaCost: 4)
Reference row for National Fame maps to data entry id 'fame' at ratings.2 (karmaCost: 8)
Reference row for Megacorporate Fame maps to data entry id 'fame' at ratings.3 (karmaCost: 12)
Reference row for Global Fame maps to data entry id 'fame' at ratings.4 (karmaCost: 16)

unmappedReferenceRows.referenceName: Jack of All Trades, Master of None
unmappedReferenceRows.note: Reference name includes ', Master of None' suffix; data entry uses shorter name 'Jack of All Trades'
